name: create-jira-task
description: Turn a rough request into a full Jira ticket via the Atlassian MCP. Two-phase flow: proposal (title, body, SP estimate with visible hour breakdown) → per-ticket confirmation → `createJiraIssue`. Project, custom fields, language convention, SP matrix and split thresholds are configured per-repo via `.claude/create-jira-task.json`; sensible defaults apply when keys are absent. Triggers on DE/EN phrasings like 'mach daraus einen Jira-Task', 'erfasse das als Ticket', 'create a Jira task for …'.
